name: Research and archive
description: Convert 3 web pages to Markdown, archive them locally, then build a small embeddings index you can query.
prerequisites: On first run the embeddings tool downloads ~90 MB of model weights to <Storage>/models/embeddings/.
Replace the three URLs in the prompt with the pages you want to archive.

defaultJob.name: Research and archive — quick start
defaultJob.prompt: Step 1: call markdown_convert for each of these 3 URLs and store the resulting Markdown into c:\temp\research\<slug>.md using file_system.write: https://learn.microsoft.com/dotnet/, https://learn.microsoft.com/aspnet/core/, https://learn.microsoft.com/aspire/. Step 2: call embeddings.index over the c:\temp\research folder. Step 3: call embeddings.search for the query 'how do I host a Blazor app in Aspire' and return the top 3 hits with their source paths.
